text: This province gets +1 strength for each claimed ring.
flavorText: "You cannot balance the elements when you are without balance." – Tao of Shinsei
name: Teachings of the Elements

text: Action: During a conflict at this province, choose a facedown province – reveal that province.
flavorText: The first stage of attack. The first line of defense.
name: Border Fortress

text: This province gets +2 strength while you have an Earth role. Interrupt: When this province is broken – the attacking player reveals his or her hand. Choose a card in their hand and discard any number of copies of that card from their hand.
name: Upholding Authority

text: Action: During a conflict, choose an attacking character without attachments – until the end of the conflict, set that character's skill values to its printed values.
flavorText: "The kami are already angry. It's not difficult to turn their rage to your advantage." – Kuni Yori
name: Apprentice Earthcaller

text: During [element-earth] conflicts, each character you control gets +1[conflict-military] and +1[conflict-political]. Action: During a conflict, lose 1 honor. Choose a player – that player discards 1 card at random from his or her hand.
name: Kuni Yori

text: You may look at facedown cards in each province you control. Action: Choose a card in one of your provinces – switch that card with a card in another of your provinces or discard it.
flavorText: "Life is already fleeting. Why waste such precious time with war?"
name: Asahina Takako

text: Action: During an [element-air] conflict – gain 1 honor.
flavorText: "Daily caretaking leads to a life of peace." – Tao of Shinsei
name: Bonsai Garden

text: This character gets +1[conflict-military] and +1[conflict-political] while you have claimed the [element-fire] or [element-void] ring.
flavorText: "You clearly have not seen what I can do."
name: Impulsive Novice

text: This character gets +2[conflict-political] while you have claimed the [element-air] or [element-water] ring.
flavorText: "Each detail you reveal is another tool your opponent will use against you." – Sensei Nagori
name: Court Novice

text: Reaction: After you pass in the dynasty phase – play this character from your province.
flavorText: "Conceal yourself like the desert viper within the dunes."
name: Sneaky Shinjo

text: This character cannot be honored or dishonored. Forced Reaction: After this character is declared as an attacked or defender – lose 1 honor. (Unlimited.)
flavorText: "No price could be too high for victory."
name: Marauding Oni

text: Action: Lose 2 honor. Choose a participating character you control – until the end of the conflict, that character gets +4[conflict-military] and cannot be targeted by opponents' card abilities.
name: Spreading the Darkness

text: Fire role only. Limit 1 per character. Each other attachment on attached character gains ancestral.
flavorText: Facing a crisis of children, the Dragon were willing to turn even to the peasantry to find new heirs.
name: Adopted Kin

text: This character gets 2[conflict-military] while you have claimed the [element-fire] or [element-water] ring.
flavorText: "Take arms! The Unicorn are at our door!"
name: Ikoma Reservist

text: Earth role only. Restricted. If an opponent is more honorable than you, discard this attachment.
name: Writ of Authority

text: Action: During a [element-water] conflict – put this character into play from your hand in the conflict. At the end of the conflict, shuffle it into your conflict deck.
flavorText: The sea's embrace is cold and sharp.
name: Feral Ningyo

text: Action: Each player draws 2 cards. Then, each player discards 2 cards from his or her hand. Errata from RRG v1.7
flavorText: Pray it does not foretell disaster.
name: Oracle of Stone

text: Interrupt: When attached character leaves play – move this attachment to another character controlled by the same player.
flavorText: "Some say greed is an illness. They don't know how right they are." – Ikoma Ikehata
name: Tainted Koku

text: Water role only. Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict, if you control more participating characters than your opponent, choose a non-unique participating character – bow that character.
name: Press of Battle

text: Earth role only. Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict, choose a card in an opponent's province – discard that card.
name: Sabotage
